deletion_policy.description: Specifies the action to take on the subaccount when the resource is deleted; options are "ABANDON" or "DELETE".

display_name.description: Name of the billing subaccount to display in the Google Cloud Console, must be unique within the parent billing account.

master_billing_account.description: Specifies the ID of the master billing account to associate with the subaccount, which must already exist and have permissions for creating subaccounts.
